payload.subject: Re: Confirm well-baby visit
payload.body: hi! yes, tuesday june 23 at 10:15 am with dr. okafor works great — please go ahead and confirm us for that slot. thanks!

parsed.rationale: Confirming the offered appointment slot directly since the event is a straightforward scheduling request; confidence is moderate because no calendar context was available to verify the parent's availability on June 23.
